records.question: Which purchases of exactly 1522 shares with an amount of 822.803 were made on or before 1990-12-02 09:03:38 by investors whose details are l and have sales details of p?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT transactions.transaction_id FROM transactions
JOIN ref_transaction_types ON transactions.transaction_type_code = ref_transaction_types.transaction_type_code
JOIN investors ON transactions.investor_id = investors.investor_id
JOIN sales ON transactions.transaction_id = sales.sales_transaction_id
WHERE investors.investor_details = 'l' AND transactions.share_count = '1522' AND transactions.amount_of_transaction = 822.803 AND ref_transaction_types.transaction_type_description = 'Purchase' AND transactions.date_of_transaction <= '1990-12-02 09:03:38' AND sales.sales_details = 'p'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Transactions.transaction_id
FROM Transactions
JOIN Purchases ON Purchases.purchase_transaction_id = Transactions.transaction_id
JOIN Investors ON Investors.investor_id = Transactions.investor_id
JOIN Sales ON Sales.sales_transaction_id = Transactions.transaction_id
WHERE Transactions.share_count = '1522'
  AND Transactions.amount_of_transaction = 822.803
  AND Transactions.date_of_transaction <= '1990-12-02 09:03:38'
  AND Investors.Investor_details = 'l'
  AND Sales.sales_details = 'p'

records.question: Which transactions involve exactly 930 shares and have a transaction amount of at least 0.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT transactions.transaction_id FROM transactions
JOIN ref_transaction_types ON transactions.transaction_type_code = ref_transaction_types.transaction_type_code
JOIN sales ON transactions.transaction_id = sales.sales_transaction_id
WHERE transactions.share_count = '930' AND transactions.amount_of_transaction >= 0.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT transaction_id
FROM Transactions
WHERE share_count = '930'
  AND amount_of_transaction >= 0.0

records.question: What transactions occurred on 1988-09-16 19:02:51 with exactly 8718572 shares?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT transactions.transaction_id FROM transactions
JOIN investors ON transactions.investor_id = investors.investor_id
JOIN lots ON investors.investor_id = lots.investor_id
WHERE transactions.date_of_transaction = '1988-09-16 19:02:51' AND transactions.share_count = '8718572'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT transaction_id
FROM Transactions
WHERE date_of_transaction = '1988-09-16 19:02:51'
  AND share_count = '8718572'

records.question: What transactions since 2002-04-07 20:28:37 have sales_details exactly p, investor_details exactly d, and a transaction amount at most 183.2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT transactions.transaction_id FROM transactions
JOIN investors ON transactions.investor_id = investors.investor_id
JOIN sales ON transactions.transaction_id = sales.sales_transaction_id
WHERE transactions.date_of_transaction >= '2002-04-07 20:28:37' AND sales.sales_details = 'p' AND investors.investor_details = 'd' AND transactions.amount_of_transaction <= 183.2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Transactions.transaction_id
FROM Transactions
JOIN Sales ON Sales.sales_transaction_id = Transactions.transaction_id
JOIN Investors ON Investors.investor_id = Transactions.investor_id
WHERE Transactions.date_of_transaction > '2002-04-07 20:28:37'
  AND Sales.sales_details = 'p'
  AND Investors.Investor_details = 'd'
  AND Transactions.amount_of_transaction <= 183.2

records.question: What transactions occurred on or before 1988-09-16 19:02:51 with exactly 8718572 shares and an amount of at least 302507.6996, where the investor details are exactly k and the lot details are d?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT transactions.transaction_id FROM transactions
JOIN investors ON transactions.investor_id = investors.investor_id
JOIN lots ON investors.investor_id = lots.investor_id
WHERE lots.lot_details = 'd' AND investors.investor_details = 'k' AND transactions.date_of_transaction <= '1988-09-16 19:02:51' AND transactions.share_count = '8718572' AND transactions.amount_of_transaction >= 302507.6996
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Transactions.transaction_id
FROM Transactions
JOIN Investors ON Transactions.investor_id = Investors.investor_id
JOIN Transactions_Lots ON Transactions.transaction_id = Transactions_Lots.transaction_id
JOIN Lots ON Transactions_Lots.lot_id = Lots.lot_id
WHERE Transactions.date_of_transaction <= '1988-09-16 19:02:51'
  AND Transactions.share_count = '8718572'
  AND Transactions.amount_of_transaction >= 302507.6996
  AND Investors.Investor_details = 'k'
  AND Lots.lot_details = 'd'
